snippet: The edge runtime story is maturing fast. WinterCG compatibility means code runs on Cloudflare, Vercel, Deno, and Fastly without changes. Portability is the real win.
author: dev_edge@mastodon.social

snippet: Benchmarked Deno Deploy vs Cloudflare Workers on 10k req/s workloads. Both deliver sub-20ms p99. The edge runtime era is fully here.
author: bench_master@mastodon.social
